objects.query: SELECT Id, Name, Category__c, InspectionQuestiontype__c FROM AssessmentIndicatorDefinition WHERE Category__c IN ('General Requirements', 'Tanning', 'Tattoo & Body Piercing', 'Manicure and Pedicure', 'Laser', 'Permit to Operate Mobile Food Service', 'Construction of Mobile Food Premises', 'Shellfish Food Protection', 'Shellfish Food Safety Management', 'Menu Warning Requirement', 'RTE Meat Food Sources and Protection') AND RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSAssessmentIndicatorDefinition'
